productDisplayName: Puma Women's Coral Pink White Flip Flop
description: This absolutely stylish pair of Coral flip flops from puma offers comfort at its best. The floral design on the footbed and the velvetty straps renders it a touch of royalty. With circular grooves on the outsole offering an absolutely grippy stability, it makes for a great pool and beachwear too.Upper Quick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feetThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and styleVelvetty straps for soft, comfort and stylish feel Midsole Soft, cushioned EVA footbed for step-in comfortFloral prints on the footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with circular suction lugs for grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash This absolutely stylish pair of Coral flip flops from puma offers comfort at its best.
